sourceText: Reading and learning accumulate knowledge and experience, making a person more mature and complete.
Youth desires wisdom, age is full of regret.
This implies that one should pursue wisdom in youth to reduce regret in old age.
Suffered from physical disabilities due to childhood illness (smallpox), his father's disappearance, his mother's witchcraft trial, economic poverty, and religious persecution.
Through deep faith, persistent scholarly inquiry, and thorough analysis of vast observational data, he discovered the mathematical laws of planetary motion and led the Scientific Revolution.
The heavens are a mirror of the human mind.
Exploring the universe is also a process of understanding one's inner self.
The book of nature is written in the language of mathematics.
Expresses the belief that all phenomena in the universe can be explained by mathematical laws.
Emphasizes the importance of persistent effort when facing difficult problems, rather than giving up.
Birth and death years not found in text.
Early widowhood and prolonged mourning after the death of Prince Albert, early political instability and maternal control, and the isolation of her youth.
Resolutely continuing her royal duties despite personal tragedy, upholding her husband's vision, maintaining imperial stability, and becoming a symbol of duty and endurance.
